title: New coach on the up at FC United
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna's FC United is back...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna's FC United is back in form under coach Msimelelo \"Major\" Keyizana, who has steered the team to consecutive victories in the Safa Eden Regional Men's League.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna's FC United is back in form under coach Msimelelo \"Major\" Keyizana, who has steered the team to consecutive victories in the Safa Eden Regional Men's League."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A former star player for FC United, Major has spent most of his footballing career donning the club's colours."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He takes the helm following a difficult 2024/25 season, which saw FC United struggle after losing key players, including the late Aviwe \"Lion\" Tshandu.","html":"He takes the helm following a difficult 2024/25 season, which saw FC United struggle after losing key players, including the late Aviwe \"Lion\" Tshandu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From player to coachBorn in Lusikisiki, Keyizana began playing football at a young age, like many children in rural villages, where the game was a pastime played on the streets.","html":"From player to coach
Born in Lusikisiki, Keyizana began playing football at a young age, like many children in rural villages, where the game was a pastime played on the streets."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He moved to Knysna in 2007 to further his studies and has remained part of the local football community ever since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Choosing a coaching career was not easy. It's a big responsibility, but I wanted to give young talents a chance. It's time to expose the youth in the Greater Knysna area to the game.\"","html":"\"Choosing a coaching career was not easy. It's a big responsibility, but I wanted to give young talents a chance. It's time to expose the youth in the Greater Knysna area to the game.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Giving back to the communityKeyizana emphasised that his coaching is driven by a desire to give back to the community.","html":"Giving back to the community
Keyizana emphasised that his coaching is driven by a desire to give back to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"After many years playing football, I knew I wanted to coach and contribute to Knysna. Beyond football, I'm also raising my son here, so the town means a lot to me,\" he said.","html":"\"After many years playing football, I knew I wanted to coach and contribute to Knysna. Beyond football, I'm also raising my son here, so the town means a lot to me,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Calling all fansTo supporters, Keyizana had a clear message: \"We need you more than ever. Attend our home games, cheer for the boys, and be our 12th man. With your support, FC United can achieve great things.\"","html":"Calling all fans
To supporters, Keyizana had a clear message: \"We need you more than ever. Attend our home games, cheer for the boys, and be our 12th man. With your support, FC United can achieve great things.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New coach on the up at FC United
